hero.title: Manage Your Service Business
hero.subtitle: Without Complications
hero.description: The all-in-one platform for salons, clinics, spas and events. Online bookings, smart management and happy customers.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.selectShop: Select a shop to view pending bookings

shops.title: My Shops
shops.description: Manage all your shops and locations from one place.
shops.noShopsDescription: Create your first shop to get started

form.name: Shop Name
form.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this shop? This action cannot be undone.

config.title: Configuration
config.confirmationModeDescription: Choose how new customer bookings will be managed.
config.manualModeDescription: Bookings are created with "pending" status. You must manually confirm them from the dashboard. Customers receive a "Booking Received" email and then a "Confirmation" email when you approve it.
config.automaticModeDescription: Bookings are created directly with "confirmed" status. Customers receive a "Booking Confirmed" email immediately. Ideal for streamlining the process.
config.modeTip: Tip: Use Manual mode if you need to review availability or coordinate with your team before confirming. Use Automatic if you trust your schedule system and want instant confirmations.

booking.title: Book Appointment
booking.noSlots: No time slots available for this date
booking.consent: I accept the processing of my personal data according to the privacy policy (GDPR)
booking.marketing: I wish to receive promotions and news
booking.verificationDescription: We will send a verification code to your email address
booking.successDescription: Your booking has been confirmed. We've sent you an email with the details.

services.title: Services
services.noServicesDescription: Create your first service to get started

form.name: Service Name
form.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this service?

bookingReceived.subject: Booking Received
bookingReceived.title: Booking Received
bookingReceived.intro: Thank you for your booking! We have received your request and it is pending confirmation. We will notify you as soon as it is confirmed.
bookingReceived.statusMessage: You will receive a confirmation email once your booking is approved.
bookingReceived.nextStepsMessage: Your booking will be reviewed and confirmed soon. You will receive a confirmation email when it's ready. If you need to modify or cancel your booking, please contact us at least 24 hours in advance.
bookingReceived.closing: We look forward to seeing you!

bookingConfirmed.subject: Booking Confirmed
bookingConfirmed.title: Booking Confirmed
bookingConfirmed.intro: We are pleased to confirm that your booking has been accepted. We are excited to serve you.
bookingConfirmed.reminderMessage: Please arrive on time for your appointment. If you need to modify or cancel your booking, please contact us at least 24 hours in advance.

bookingCancelled.subject: Booking Cancelled
bookingCancelled.title: Booking Cancelled
bookingCancelled.message: If this was an error or you wish to reschedule, please contact us.
